mapper.select: SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscription s WHERE ) AS active_subscription_count, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(s.price) FROM subscription s WHERE AND s.next_payment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ), 0.00) AS monthly_expected_amount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscription s WHERE AND s.next_payment_date BETWEEN #{today} AND #{upcomingEndDate} ) AS upcoming_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscription s WHERE AND s.next_payment_date < #{today} ) AS overdue_count

SELECT s.subscription_id, s.name, s.category_id, c.name AS category_name, s.price, s.currency, s.next_payment_date FROM subscription s INNER JOIN subscription_category c ON s.category_id = c.category_id WHERE AND s.next_payment_date BETWEEN #{today} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY s.next_payment_date ASC, s.subscription_id DESC

SELECT c.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.color_code, c.icon, COALESCE(SUM(s.price), 0.00) AS total_amount, COUNT(*) AS subscription_count FROM subscription s INNER JOIN subscription_category c ON s.category_id = c.category_id WHERE AND s.next_payment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY c.category_id, c.name, c.color_code, c.icon ORDER BY total_amount DESC, c.category_id ASC
